briefdescription.para: The GameObject being configured.
Pointer to the font resource provider.
The shader used for text rendering.
The text color.
The text content to display.
The font scale factor.
Format string for number display (std::vformat syntax).
Whether this text should be configured as UI text.
The font identifier.
Format string for timestamp display (std::vformat syntax).
Whether a TimeFormatterComponent should be attached.
Whether a NumberFormatterComponent should be attached.
Whether the timer should display remaining instead of elapsed time.
Constructs a TextRenderableConfig for the given GameObject.
Sets the shader for text rendering.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Sets the text color.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Builds the text renderable and attaches to a parent GameObject.

parameterdescription.para: The parent GameObject to attach to.

briefdescription.para: Builds the text renderable and attaches to a parent SceneNode.

parameterdescription.para: The parent SceneNode to attach to.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font resource provider.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Configures this text as a UI text component.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Attaches a NumberFormatterComponent with the given format.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Attaches a TimeFormatterComponent with the given format.

parameterdescription.para: A std::vformat-compatible string expecting minutes and seconds.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Switches the time formatter to display remaining time.

detaileddescription.para: Only effective when formattedAsTimestamp() has been called.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Sets the text content.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font identifier.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Sets the font scale factor.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.

briefdescription.para: Builds the text renderable and adds components to the GameObject.

detaileddescription.para: Creates a TextRenderable with the configured properties and adds RenderableComponent and ModelAabbComponent. If configured as UI text, also adds UiTextComponent.

simplesect.para: Reference to this config for method chaining.
